reviews.comment:
Voy siempre, mí estación de servicio preferida. Atención cordial y profesional.

reviews.comment:
bien ahi que aprendan a usar mercado pago dado que no supieron tomarme por ese medio tuve que abonar en billetes 😔😔😔

(Translated by Google)
Good for them for learning how to use Mercado Pago, since they couldn't process my payment that way and I had to pay in cash 😔😔😔
